commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: docs(browser): clarify networkidle is managed-browser only, not existing-session (fixes #80587)
target.body:
## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed:** Two docs files (`browser-control.md` and `browser.md`) gave contradictory answers about whether `wait --load networkidle` is supported. `browser-control.md` showed it without qualification; `browser.md` stated flatly "is not supported". The fix adds profile-scoped qualifiers so both files agree: `networkidle` works on managed browser, not on `existing-session` profiles.

- **Environment tested:** macOS, openclaw main (2026.6.x), local repo build.

- **Steps run after the patch:**
  1. Edited `docs/tools/browser-control.md` line 324 to add `(managed browser only; not available on existing-session profiles)` qualifier
  2. Edited `docs/tools/browser.md` line 746 to clarify `is not supported on existing-session profiles (works on managed browser)`
  3. Ran `pnpm build` to verify docs build cleanly
  4. Verified with `grep -n` that both files now include the profile-scoped qualifier
  5. Confirmed the existing-session test at `extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.existing-session.test.ts:325` validates the `networkidle` restriction

- **Evidence after fix:**

```
$ node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const bc=fs.readFileSync('docs/tools/browser-control.md','utf8'); const b=fs.readFileSync('docs/tools/browser.md','utf8'); console.log('browser-control managed-only:', bc.includes('managed browser only')); console.log('browser existing-session:', b.includes('existing-session'))"
browser-control managed-only: true
browser existing-session: true

$ grep -n "networkidle" docs/tools/browser-control.md
324:  - `openclaw browser wait --load networkidle` (managed browser only; not available on `existing-session` profiles)

$ grep -n "networkidle" docs/tools/browser.md
746:- **Wait / upload / dialog** - `wait --url` supports exact, substring, and glob patterns; `wait --load networkidle` is not supported on `existing-session` profiles (works on managed browser). Upload hooks require `ref` or `inputRef`, one file at a time, no CSS `element`. Dialog hooks do not support timeout overrides or `dialogId`.

$ pnpm build
✓ built in 482ms
```

- **Observed result after fix:** Both docs files now agree on the profile-scoped behavior. `browser-control.md` qualifies `--load networkidle` as managed-browser only. `browser.md` clarifies the restriction is for `existing-session` profiles. Build passes cleanly.

- **What was not tested:** No runtime behavior change — this is a docs-only fix. The existing-session `networkidle` restriction was verified via the pre-existing test at `agent.existing-session.test.ts:325` ("fails closed for existing-session networkidle waits").
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
